---
title: "ENVS193DS-code"
format: html
editor: visual
author: "Valentina Caro"
date: "03-13-2026"
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: reading in packages
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(scales)
library(ggeffects)
library(MuMIn)

```

HTML Link: <https://valecarov.github.io/ENVS-193DS_winter_2026_final/code/193ds-code.html>
